heading: Seal
label: 502 Seal
text: The Attorney General shall have a seal for the Department of Justice. The design of the seal is subject to the approval of the President.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 292R.S. § 353.The section is rewritten to conform to other statutes authorizing departmental seals. The words “The seal heretofore provided for the office of the Attorney General shall be” are omitted as obsolete.
